title: Hody’s Men Seize the Palace
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Vander Decken, Narrator, Royal Guards, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Fish-Men. The core story beat is hody’s men seize the palace.
scene: The scene centers on hody’s men seize the palace, with Unknown person #1, Vander Decken, Narrator, Royal Guards, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Fish-Men driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaah Hihihh!!! Hh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Vander Decken has gone after my beloved Shirahoshi!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: I beg of you all!! I will give you anything you desire!!! Just let me go after decken!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will give you gold, silver, treasures, even the lives of my soldiers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: H - Hold on a moment, your majesty...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: He is going to take Shirahoshii from me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Shirahoshii, is my one greatest treasure!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: What a pathetic sight you are, Neptunee...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that my sworn enemies, the straw hat pirates, would aid in my conquering of the rylugu Palace...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sworn enemies...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...?! He bears... Arlong's mark...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: ...nghh.... I had heard from jimbei that there was something afoot in the fishman district...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: But I never expected you, former members of Neptunee's own army, to be behind it...!! Have you no shame, hordy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Jahahah! Shame?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you say that as though I ever held any great pride in my place in that army.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only reason I served as a soldier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...was to hone the skills I would need on the field of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You Fiend...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and it worked. I have become strong...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Ever since I was a child, I have seen nothing but fishmen being oppressed by the detestable humans...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: My greatest heroes were the ARLONG Pirates, for having the strength and ambition to smash those Fifty humans' faces in!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: And we are the new fishman pirates... here to revive their broken will!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I strived to become strong, so that when Arlong began his great plan to reach beyond East Blue and conquer the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I would be ready to stand at his side, as his right-hand man!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: But thanks to a certain bunch of filthy humans, that dream never came to pass!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...!!! These fishmen are sympathisers with Arlong and his cronies?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmmmm?! Arlong?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember that someone

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: ...I don't think I've ever tasted that particular delicacy!! Yoho hohoho-

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Ouch! Usopp- San, why are you kicking me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: move it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Creack

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Soshark.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That grip strength is ridiculous!! What is he trying to do?!

summary: Hody’s Men Seize the Palace. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
